nasb.text: They shall not live in your land, because they will make you sin against Me; for if you serve their gods, it will surely be a snare to you.”

esv.text: They shall not dwell in your land, lest they make you sin against me; for if you serve their gods, it will surely be a snare to you.”

cnv.text: 不可讓他們住在你的境內，恐怕他們使你得罪我；如果你事奉他們的神，這必成為你的網羅。”

ccb.text: 也不可让这些民族住在你的土地上，免得他们使你得罪我，你若供奉他们的神明，必因此而陷入网罗。”
